name: Lebanese Mjderah
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, cut into julienne strips
Mint leaves dried, minced Garlic minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water to the lentils in a large pot and bring to a boil.
2. Once boiling, add the rice and continue cooking for 15 more minutes, stirring continuously until the rice begins to bubble at the top.
3. Stir occasionally for another 5 minutes after adding the onion strips sautéed in olive oil.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Garnish with green onions.
6. Serve with cucumbers mixed into yogurt, seasoned with garlic and mint, accompanied by pita bread.
